name: Responsible AI in Scholarly Publishing, Cambium Academy Course 04
description: Completed the full learning path of Cambium Academy Course 04: the 12-module lecture covering the author's, reviewer's, and editor's chairs; all 24 flashcards; all six hands-on AI Lab games; and a 20-question quiz passed at 70% or better. Approximately 3 instructional hours. Every policy and statistic in the curriculum was verified against its primary source on 13 July 2026.

criteria.narrative: Read or watch the full 12-module lecture; clear all 24 flashcards (flip required before marking); win all six AI Lab games (Declare It, Assist or Misconduct, Ghost Citations, Red Flags, The Poisoned Manuscript, The Detector Trap); then pass the 20-question quiz at 70% or better. The quiz stays locked until every prior step is complete. Holders demonstrate that they can place an AI-use disclosure correctly under 2026 ICMJE, COPE, and publisher rules; distinguish permitted assistance from misconduct; verify a reference list against the Crossref registry; maintain peer-review confidentiality; identify checkable scientific red flags; and refuse to accept, reject, or accuse on the basis of an AI-detector score. Holders who also pass The Practical (an optional honors exam at a simulated editor's desk, graded against the live Crossref registry, whose decision letter fails automatically if it accuses an author on detector evidence) carry a DESK-VERIFIED mark on their certificate.
